# Usha Tutorials - Full Site Content

> A trusted tuition center in Kalwa, Thane providing expert Mathematics and Science coaching for Std 3rd to 9th across CBSE, ICSE, SSC, and IB boards.

---

## 💎 Why Parents Trust Usha Tutorials

*   **Safe & Structured:** A secure, supportive environment fostering confidence and effective learning.
*   **Small Batches:** Focused attention with interactive, small group sessions.
*   **Tailored Coaching:** Individualized, curriculum-aligned guidance (Maths/Science) for Std 3-9.
*   **Exam Excellence:** Rigorous test prep, proactive doubt-solving, and consistent progress tracking.
*   **Engaging Methods:** Innovative teaching using hands-on activities, discussions, and visual aids.

---

## 📋 Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

*   **Subjects/Boards:** Specializing in Mathematics and Science for Std 3rd to 9th (CBSE, ICSE, SSC, IB).
*   **Location:** Situated in Kalwa, Thane (B-5, Sai Vihar CHS, Parsik Nagar).
*   **Class Sizes:** Small batches ensure personalized attention and active engagement.
*   **Admissions:** Open for new batches; contact us via phone or WhatsApp for details.
*   **Schedule:** Mon-Sat, 9 AM - 8 PM (with customized slots for different boards/standards).
*   **Testing:** Regular assessments and dedicated doubt-solving sessions are included.

---

## 🏫 Our Programs
*   **CBSE/ICSE/SSC/IB:** Specialised coaching for major curriculum boards.

---

## 📞 Contact Details
*   **Location:** Sai Vihar CHS, Parsik Nagar, Kharegaon, Kalwa, Thane.
